name: Asana
description: Work management platform for teams. Manage projects, tasks, and team workflows to track progress and hit deadlines.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Asana is a work management platform that helps teams organize, track, and manage their work. Use this plugin to manage projects, tasks, and team collaboration. **Note:** Get your personal access token at [Asana Developer Console](https://app.asana.com/0/developer-console).

Authorization.description: Asana personal access token (Environment variable: ASANA_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: List Workspaces
tools.description: Return all workspaces and organizations accessible to the authenticated user

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-100)

offset.description: Pagination offset token from a previous response

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: Return all projects in all workspaces and teams, or optionally filter by workspace or team

workspace.description: The workspace or organization GID to filter projects by

team.description: The team GID to filter projects by

archived.description: Only return projects whose archived field matches this value

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-100)

offset.description: Pagination offset token from a previous response

tools.name: Get Project
tools.description: Return the complete project record for a single project

project_gid.description: The globally unique identifier (GID) of the project

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

tools.name: List Tasks
tools.description: Return all tasks in a project, optionally filtered by completion status or date

project.description: The project GID to filter tasks by (required unless assignee is specified)

completed_since.description: ISO 8601 date-time to filter tasks completed after this date

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-100)

offset.description: Pagination offset token from a previous response

tools.name: Get Task
tools.description: Return the complete task record for a single task

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier (GID) of the task

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

tools.name: Create Task
tools.description: Create a new task in a workspace or project

data.description: Task data object. Required fields: name. Optional: workspace, projects (array of GIDs), notes, due_on (YYYY-MM-DD), assignee (GID or 'me'). Example: {"name": "My Task", "projects": ["12345"], "notes": "Details", "due_on": "2025-03-01"}

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier (GID) of the task to update

data.description: Task fields to update. Example: {"name": "Updated Name", "notes": "Updated notes", "completed": true, "due_on": "2025-04-01"}

tools.name: List Task Comments
tools.description: Return a list of stories (comments and activity) on a task

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier (GID) of the task

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-100)

tools.name: Add Task Comment
tools.description: Add a comment to a task

task_gid.description: The globally unique identifier (GID) of the task to comment on

data.description: Story data object with the comment text. Example: {"text": "This is my comment"}

tools.name: List Teams
tools.description: Return all teams in the specified workspace or organization

workspace_gid.description: The GID of the workspace or organization to list teams for

opt_fields.description: Comma-separated list of optional fields to include in the response

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-100)
